description: §41.14.6 — error-strategy="X" on <formFor> is only valid as "per-field" (default), "summary", or "both". An unrecognized value fires E-FORMFOR-ERROR-STRATEGY-INVALID.
rationale: §41.14.6: error-strategy= SHALL accept one of three string literal values ("per-field" | "summary" | "both"); unknown values SHALL emit E-FORMFOR-ERROR-STRATEGY-INVALID.
